case_title: S.F. CORP. VS. KURT KAYWOOD et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-02-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 514

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2011 Continued To Sep-16-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-02-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

KEVIN S. EIKENBERRY, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) S.F. CORP.,

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) KURT KAYWOOD for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $6270.00
PUNITIVE DAMAGES - $50,000.00
Costs - $470.00
Total judgment in the amount of $56,740.00

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2011 Continued To Aug-05-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
